summaryShort: Excavator operator was traveling down a haul road when the machine veered off the road and fell over a 317-foot highwall.
summaryDetailed: Equipment operator lost control on a highwall, highlighting the need for berms and edge protection.
fieldObservationTemplates: Excavator operator was traveling down a haul road when the machine veered off the road and fell over a 317-foot highwall.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer the operator was speeding without evidence.

summaryShort: Excavator was engulfed by rocks from a highwall failure while operating at the base of the face.
summaryDetailed: Failure to maintain safe distance from unstable highwall face resulted in fatal engulfment.
fieldObservationTemplates: Excavator was engulfed by rocks from a highwall failure while operating at the base of the face.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer failure of specific rock bolt systems without report evidence.

summaryShort: Miner suffered fatal injuries when a hook and strap assembly failed during longwall shield realignment.
summaryDetailed: Failure of rigging component during high-tension operation led to fatal strike.
fieldObservationTemplates: Miner suffered fatal injuries when a hook and strap assembly failed during longwall shield realignment.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer the hook was used beyond capacity without report data.

summaryShort: Worker was replacing a discharge line in an excavation when the trench walls collapsed.
summaryDetailed: Trench lacked required shoring or sloping, leading to fatal collapse.
fieldObservationTemplates: Worker was replacing a discharge line in an excavation when the trench walls collapsed.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer soil type without explicit geotechnical report findings.

summaryShort: Delivery truck driver was killed when his vehicle traveled off the roadway and overturned into a ravine.
summaryDetailed: Roadway edge protection failure led to vehicle departure and fatal rollover.
fieldObservationTemplates: Delivery truck driver was killed when his vehicle traveled off the roadway and overturned into a ravine.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer mechanical steering failure.

summaryShort: Miner sustained fatal electrical injuries during routine maintenance of underground power distribution system.
summaryDetailed: Contact with energized components occurred during maintenance due to inadequate isolation.
fieldObservationTemplates: Miner sustained fatal electrical injuries during routine maintenance of underground power distribution system.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer absence of training without reviewing training records.

summaryShort: Contractor suffered fatal burns when a pressurized hydraulic line ruptured and ignited while performing hot work.
summaryDetailed: Proximity of pressurized flammable fluid source to welding operation caused immediate ignition.
fieldObservationTemplates: Contractor suffered fatal burns when a pressurized hydraulic line ruptured and ignited while performing hot work.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer a lack of fire watch without inspection findings.

incidentType: Worker fell 20 feet from an el
summaryShort: Worker fell 20 feet from an elevated platform because the edge guardrails were not fully installed.
summaryDetailed: Incomplete guardrail installation exposed employee to fall hazard at height.
fieldObservationTemplates: Worker fell 20 feet from an elevated platform because the edge guardrails were not fully installed.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer fall arrest usage.

summaryShort: Pressure release valve failed during maintenance, resulting in toxic chemical release into the work area.
summaryDetailed: Failure of pressure mitigation component led to hazardous substance exposure.
fieldObservationTemplates: Pressure release valve failed during maintenance, resulting in toxic chemical release into the work area.

incidentType: Worker was entangled in a rota
summaryShort: Worker was entangled in a rotating machine shaft after the safety guard was removed for production speed.
summaryDetailed: Deliberate removal of safety guard for operational throughput led to entanglement hazard.
fieldObservationTemplates: Worker was entangled in a rotating machine shaft after the safety guard was removed for production speed.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer supervisor's direct instruction.

summaryShort: Emergency exit was blocked by production pallets and illuminated signage was not visible.
summaryDetailed: Obstruction of emergency egress prevents safe evacuation.
fieldObservationTemplates: Emergency exit was blocked by production pallets and illuminated signage was not visible.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer duration of blockage.

incidentType: Miner was killed by a fall of
summaryShort: Miner was killed by a fall of roof material while working near the active mining face.
summaryDetailed: Failure of secondary roof support in unstable ground resulted in fatal strike.
fieldObservationTemplates: Miner was killed by a fall of roof material while working near the active mining face.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer geological survey error.

summaryShort: Two powered haulage vehicles collided at a blind intersection in the pit area.
summaryDetailed: Failure of traffic management systems at a blind intersection caused a fatal collision.
fieldObservationTemplates: Two powered haulage vehicles collided at a blind intersection in the pit area.

summaryShort: Contractor was engulfed while entering a confined space vessel without following entry permit procedures.
summaryDetailed: Unauthorized entry into confined space without permit resulted in fatal engulfment.

summaryShort: Operator died in an explosion when explosives were handled improperly during a blasting sequence.

prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer the explosive type is defective.

summaryShort: Worker was fatally injured when an unsecured gas cylinder fell and ruptured, creating a projectile.

summaryShort: Maintenance worker attempted to repair a conveyor system without performing required energy isolation.

fieldObservationTemplates: Maintenance worker attempted to repair a conveyor system without performing required energy isolation.

summaryShort: Accumulation of fine wood dust in the shop creating a high risk of explosion during hot work.

prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer the dust system is failing, only that accumulation is present.

summaryShort: Chemical labeling and safety training records were missing, leaving operators unaware of handling risks.

summaryShort: Worker entered a grain bin without performing atmospheric testing and was trapped by shifting grain.

summaryShort: Worker fell from a ladder that was improperly placed and lacked non-slip feet.
